mapper.insert:
/* PrdtMngMapper.prdtHistInsert */ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PRDT_HIST ( SEQ , PRDT_ID , MAKER , PRDT_NM , PRDT_DESC , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , USE_YN , IMG_FILE , WEB_URL , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT SQ_MSP_GIFT_PRDT_HIST_01.nextVal , PRDT_ID , MAKER , PRDT_NM , PRDT_DESC , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , USE_YN , IMG_FILE , WEB_URL , #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE
FROM MSP_GIFT_PRDT A WHERE PRDT_ID = #{prdtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
